text: Our loan-approval model rejects more applications from one zip code than others even when credit histories match.
The medical triage chatbot returned inconsistent advice when the same symptom description was submitted twice.
Contact john.doe@example.com for customer account 4555-1212-3333 updates and SSN 123-45-6789.
The speech model transcribes men's voices accurately but misses up to 20 percent of words in women's voices.
The chatbot claims it made a decision but refuses to explain which factors it considered.
The recommendation engine produced harmful output but no engineer is assigned ownership of monitoring it.
